data.title: Southwest Airlines Stock Falls On Q1 Results, Guidance: 'Higher Fuel Expense' Weighs On Outlook
data.description: Southwest Airlines Company (NYSE: LUV) fell short of analyst expectations for first-quarter revenue and earnings per share, causing a decline in shares after market close. The company reported first-quarter revenue of $7.25 billion, reflecting a 12.8% increase from the previous year. Although this marked a company record for first-quarter revenue, it was slightly below the Street consensus estimate of $7.27 billion. First-quarter passenger revenue totaled $6.6 billion, a 13.4% increase year-over-year and a new company first-quarter record. Southwest also achieved first-quarter records for passenger, operating, and unit revenues. The first-quarter earnings per share stood at 45 cents, missing analysts' expectations.

data.title: C&S Group Enterprises LLC Announces Conference Call to Review the Second-Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results for the Period Ended March 14, 2026
data.description: C&S Group Enterprises LLC stated that a teleconference is scheduled for April 28, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET, where the management will review the Quarterly Report covering the period until March 14, 2026. After the presentation, there will be a Q&A session. A recording of the call will be accessible until May 28, 2026, midnight.

data.title: Kneat to Announce 2026 First-Quarter Financial Results May 13, 2026
data.description: Kneat is set to announce its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, following the closure of the TSX market on May 13, 2026.

data.title: StorageVault’s Disciplined Operational Execution Delivers Strong Same Store Growth and AFFO Gains in Q1 2026; Increases Dividend
data.description: On April 22, 2026, StorageVault Canada Inc. disclosed its first quarter results for 2026. Iqbal Khan, the Chief Financial Officer of the Corporation, provided insight into the performance. The company currently trades on the TSX under the symbol SVI.

data.title: BOYD GROUP SERVICES INC. ANNOUNCES NEW CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER FOR THE U.S. COLLISION BUSINESS AND NEW CHIEF COMMERCIAL OFFICER
data.description: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, on April 22, 2026, Boyd Group Services Inc. announced the appointment of Steve Hoeft as the Chief Operations Officer for the Boyd Group's U.S. collision business. This move comes as part of the company's strategic development plan to enhance operations. Boyd Group's shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: BYD) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: BGSI). This appointment signifies a significant step for the company in optimizing its U.S. collision business, demonstrating its commitment to growth and efficiency.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Appoints Dr. Charles Duncan to its Board of Directors
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. appointed Charles Duncan, Ph.D., to its Board of Directors. This addition brings the total number of members on Vanda's Board of Directors to... Vanda Pharmaceuticals' stock is listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol VNDA.

data.title: KIPP Miami to Open Two New Schools at Former Poinciana Park Elementary School Building Starting in August, Expanding High-Quality Educational Options for Families
data.description: In Miami, KIPP Miami revealed plans to be the inaugural charter operator to revive a neglected Miami-Dade County Public Schools site under Florida's School of Hope initiative. The organization will establish two additional schools at the former Poinciana Park Elementary School in Liberty City, starting in August 2026. Moreover, KIPP Miami aims to inaugurate KIPP Miami Technical High School as part of its growth, enabling students to pursue education all the way from kindergarten to career. This move signifies a significant development in the educational landscape, introducing a comprehensive approach to academic and vocational training for the community.

data.title: Canfor releases 2025 Sustainability Report
data.description: Canfor Corporation, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, has disclosed its latest 2025 Sustainability Report. This report, released on April 22, 2026, outlines the company's sustainability approach and highlights its achievements in environmental, social, and governance domains throughout the year 2025. Canfor Corporation's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol CFP.

data.title: Home BancShares, Inc. Announces Second Quarter Dividend
data.description: Conway, Arkansas - Home BancShares, Inc. declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.21 per share for shareholders of record as of May 13, 2026. The dividend, payable on June 3, 2026, is in line with the previous quarter's payment and is distributed by the parent company of Centennial Bank, listed under NYSE as HOMB.

data.title: Rivergate Marketing Returns to CSIA Conference with Insights on AI-Driven Visibility
data.description: A marketing agency specializing in industrial B2B services will take charge of a presentation at the CSIA conference on AI-driven visibility. Rivergate Marketing, LLC from ARLINGTON, Mass., will lead the discussion. The company offers strategic marketing services for control system integrators and engineering firms. This event is set to take place on April 22, 2026. Moreover, the agency will also participate in a panel discussion within the industry sector.

data.title: Yale Fertility Center Named to Newsweek's List of America's Best Fertility Clinics 2026
data.description: A prestigious national ranking by Newsweek has honored Yale Fertility Center in Orange, Connecticut as one of America's Best Fertility Clinics for 2026. This distinction sets the center apart as the only fertility practice in Connecticut to achieve this recognition. The rankings, which were recently revealed, highlight the center's excellence in providing fertility services.

data.title: PubMatic Reports Preliminary First Quarter 2026 Revenue and Adjusted EBITDA Results Above Guidance; Announces Global CRO Search
data.description: PubMatic, Inc. disclosed its preliminary unaudited figures for the first quarter of 2026, indicating a revenue of around $62.4 million. The company, listed as Nasdaq: PUBM, is recognized as a prominent AI-powered ad tech firm known for enhancing digital advertising performance. In addition to revealing these strong Q1 results, PubMatic also announced leadership changes aimed at propelling the company towards its next growth phase.

data.title: Build-to-Rent Leaders from NexMetro Communities, Catamount Constructors, National Multifamily Housing Council & Associated General Contractors of Colorado Meet to Highlight Housing Solutions with HUD Secretary Scott Turner and Congressman Gabe Evans
data.description: In Commerce City, Colorado, key figures from the build-to-rent (BTR) housing sector, such as NexMetro Communities, Catamount Constructors, National Multifamily Housing Council, and Associated General Contractors of Colorado, came together recently at Avilla Buffalo Run. The gathering was attended by U.S. Secretary of Housing and Urban Development Scott Turner and U.S. Representative Gabe Evans (CO-8). The focus was on showcasing purpose-built rental home communities, emphasizing the importance of this sector.

data.title: NewMarket Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Thomas E. Gottwald, Chairman and CEO of NewMarket Corporation (NYSE:NEU), announced the financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company reported a net income of $118.1 million, or $12.62 per share, in contrast to the net income of $125.9 million, or $13.26 per share, in the same period of 2025. Petroleum additives sales amounted to $609.8 million in the first quarter of 2026, a decrease from $645.6 million in the first quarter of 2025.

data.title: In HelloNation, Basement Waterproofing Expert Charlie Hill of Kalamazoo Shares Smart Habits for Foundation Protection
data.description: In Kalamazoo, Michigan, on April 22, 2026, a publication advises homeowners on avoiding expensive foundation repairs. The article, including insights from Charlie Hill of Great Lakes Waterproofing, highlights crucial practices to prevent such damages.

data.title: In HelloNation, Roofing Expert Michael St. Germain Shares Key Steps for Roof Repair Season
data.description: In Auburn, New York on April 22, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation discusses the importance of homeowners conducting thorough roof inspections during repair season to avoid potential expensive issues later on. Michael St. Germain from Elite Roofing and Contracting highlights the significance of checking roofs regularly to prevent costly damages.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Hits High On Trump Truce; Tesla Earnings Strong, Elon Musk On Tap
data.description: On Wednesday, the Nasdaq reached a record high driven by the strong performance of tech stocks. The late surge in Tesla's stock following positive earnings results, along with other companies, contributed to this milestone. Additionally, Dow Jones Futures indicated a positive trend as Nasdaq rose high due to a truce involving Trump. Tesla reported robust earnings and investors are anticipating Elon Musk's insights.

data.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Nasdaq Score Record Highs On War Ceasefire; Tesla Shares Jump (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following President Trump's extension of the ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran. Tesla is scheduled to release its earnings report later in the day. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq achieved record highs in the stock market amid the news of the peace agreement. Tesla's shares saw a significant increase as well.

data.title: XAI Madison Equity Premium Income Fund Will Host its Q1 2026 Quarterly Webinar on May 5th, 2026
data.description: The XAI Madison Equity Premium Income Fund (NYSE: MCN) disclosed their upcoming Quarterly Webinar scheduled on May 5th, 2026, at 12:00 pm ET. Kimberly Flynn, President at XA Investments (XAI), will lead the Q&A session during the webinar alongside Ray Di Bernardo and Drew Justman, who serve as Portfolio Managers at Madison Investments.
